title: kalimeris lautureana var. mangtaoensis
intro: Kalimeris lautureana var. mangtaoensis, also known as Mang Tao, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in China and other parts of Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Traditionally, Mang Tao is prepared as a tea or taken in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties, and it has also been used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
